summary: The batch exhibits a high level of redundancy in phrasing and structure, particularly in complaints and technical problems, with many samples using similar constructions and vocabulary. There is a noticeable lack of nuanced scenarios and diverse expressions across the intents.
missing_modes: More varied emotional expressions in complaints and refund requests.
Unique phrasing for technical problems that avoids common templates.
Diverse scenarios that reflect less typical user experiences.
overrepresented_modes: Concise and informal styles in technical problems and account issues.
Fragmented style in general questions and complaints.
Emotional expressions in refund requests and complaints.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more unique sentence structures and vocabulary for each intent.
Introduce prompts that specifically ask for diverse emotional tones and detailed scenarios.
Incorporate edge cases and rare situations more frequently to enhance diversity.
